title: Meat Miner
description: Ever wanted to make your Minecraft experience worse! With this mod who needs farming when you've got a pickaxe!
body:
Hello there fellow Minecrafter, have you ever thought to yourself "*wow I wish mining was a genuinely terrible experience*" or starved in a cave??

Well have I got the mod for **you**! The Meat Miner mod comes with all new **meaty** ores for each dimension!

Should you ever find yourself stuck in a cave without any food with this mod you can just use that trusty pickaxe of yours to mine some delicious meat right out of the cave wall!

What's that? How did it get there? How long was it there? Don't worry just enjoy your **meaty** sustenance directly from the earth.
